column1: ## Columns (tab-separated): id, mode, status, chapter, note
## mode:   run    = must compile, run, match .expected.txt (+ .exit if present)
##         reject = must FAIL to compile (nonzero exit, no binary)
## status: works     = Go-parity behavior, verified against Go semantics
##         divergent = compiles+runs but differs from Go; pinned Goo behavior
##         rejected  = deliberately not in v1 (clean decision; see note)
##         absent    = gap — construct missing, reject is incidental not designed
## The runner enforces MODE (drift gate); STATUS feeds the conformance report.
